{% if page.language == "ko" %} Noir 블로그에 글을 기고한 분들. 게스트 작성자도 환영합니다. 블로그 인덱스에서 안내를 참고하세요. {% else %} Everyone who has written for the Noir blog. Guest authors welcome; see the blog index for how to contribute. {% endif %}

{# Iterate the data-file registry (every author we've declared) rather than `site.authors` (only authors with at least one post). Team members and authors without posts both render here. A profile page only exists once an author has a post — until then the card is non-clickable. #}
    {% for key, author in site.data.authors %} {% set has_posts = site.authors[key] is defined and site.authors[key] %}
  • {% if has_posts %}{% else %}
    {% endif %} {% if author.image %} {% endif %}

    {% if has_posts %}    {% else %}
